title: bupleurum polyphyllum
intro: Bupleurum polyphyllum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven or Hare's ear, is a type of flowering plant in the parsley family (Apiaceae) native to China. The plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Bupleurum polyphyllum include reducing fever, relieving pain and inflammation, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots and rhizomes of the plant are often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions that can be used to treat various health conditions.
